narrative: Strait of Hormuz tensions drive a geopolitical risk premium as oil surges toward $85 — USD/JPY holds at 162.33 with 275bp Fed-BoJ carry sustaining the bid despite a strong -1.58 options put skew; gold higher +0.54%; equities -0.79%; DXY steady -0.05%; VIX 17.2.
